reason: Rubric failures are test design issues (text-pattern-matching tests, anti-cheating gaps) and environment issues (oxlint glob expansion in Docker), not instruction problems. Core oracle (nop=0, gold=1) passes. Tests needing rewrite: test_oxlint_ffi_tests (glob expansion), test_value_guard_rejects_non_objects/test_arg_types_cleanup_in_error_paths (text analysis not runtime verification), test_no_std_apis_in_diff/test_no_inline_import_in_diff (anti-cheating failures).
